sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Dallas Signature Sale 3126, Lot 31037 — Ancients
Diva Faustina Senior (AD 138-140/141). AV aureus (19mm, 7.32 gm, 6h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, ca. AD 141-161. DIVA FAVSTINA, draped bust of Diva Faustina Senior right, seen from front,
sales.description:
Ancients
Diva Faustina Senior (AD 138-140/141). AV aureus (19mm, 7.32 gm, 6h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, ca. AD 141-161. DIVA FAVSTINA, draped bust of Diva Faustina Senior right, seen from front, hair elaborately waved in several loops around head under thin band, braided, drawn up, and coiled on top with pearls / AET-ER-NITAS, Fortuna standing facing, head left, patera in outstretched right hand, rudder in left. Calicó 1743. RIC III (Antoninus Pius) 349a. Glistening, watery surfaces and ...

sales.description:
Ancients
Diva Faustina Senior (AD 138-140/141). AV aureus (20mm, 7.29 gm, 6h). NGC Choice AU★ 5/5 - 5/5. Rome, AD 141-161. DIVA FAVSTINA, draped bust of Diva Faustina Senior right, seen from front, hair elaborately waved in several loops around head under thin band, braided, drawn up, and coiled on top with pearls / AVGV-STA, Ceres standing facing, head left, torch in right hand, scepter in left. Calicó 1763a. RIC III (Antoninus Pius) 356a. A regal portrait of the late empress.

From The Mirab...

sales.title: Spink - Auction 25006, Lot 3232 — (x) NGC XF | Roman Empire, Antoninus Pius (AD 138-161), AV Aureus, Rome, struck c. 153-154, ANTONINVS AVG PIVS P P TR P XVII, laureate head left, rev. COS IIII, Antoninus, togate, standing left, holdi
sales.description:
(x) NGC XF | Roman Empire, Antoninus Pius (AD 138-161), AV Aureus, Rome, struck c. 153-154, ANTONINVS AVG PIVS P P TR P XVII, laureate head left, rev. COS IIII, Antoninus, togate, standing left, holding globus in right hand, 7.26g (RIC 244; Calico 1530; BMC 815; Cohen 314), lovely portrait, toned, good very fine or better, in NGC 'Ancients' holder, graded XF ~ brushed [Strike: 5/5; Surface: 3/5; Fine Style] (Cert. #8222391-001).
Provenance, 
Archer M. Huntington I, Numismatica Ars Classica 67,...
